name: image-to-video
description: Animates a still image into a 5 or 10 second video clip using Kling v2 via ComfyUI Cloud partner nodes.

dynamic_params.1.image: Filename of previously uploaded image (via POST /api/upload/image). Use the 'name' field from upload response.
dynamic_params.2.model_name: kling-v1 | kling-v1-5 | kling-v1-6 | kling-v2-master | kling-v2-1 | kling-v2-1-master | kling-v2-5-turbo

expected_inputs.image: Must upload image first via POST /api/upload/image, then reference by returned filename

notes.save_video_format: Must be 'mp4' not 'video/h264-mp4'. Codec options: 'auto' or 'h264'.
notes.job_status: ComfyUI Cloud uses 'success' not 'completed' as the done status
